name: Faiss (Meta)
description: Faiss (Meta) — Open-source library from Meta for efficient similarity search and clustering of dense vectors at scale.

seo.title: Faiss (Meta) — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Faiss (Meta): Faiss (Meta) — Open-source library from Meta for efficient similarity search and clustering of dense vectors at scale.

when_to_use: Building billion-scale nearest neighbor search indexes in Python
Running fast GPU-accelerated vector similarity search locally
Indexing dense embeddings for RAG retrieval backends
Experimenting with HNSW, IVF, and PQ index configurations

cons: Python bindings can be finicky on edge cases
review.verdict: The reference baseline — use directly only if you want infra ownership.
review.best_for: ML engineers embedding vector search inside their own services
review.not_for: App teams that just want a managed vector DB like Pinecone
